stocks.impact_theory: Nvidia's $2B investment in Marvell for NVLink Fusion amid AI ecosystem expansion counters broader tech selloff from Iran war oil spike. Economic: Boosts AI infra spending. Psychology: Renews AI hype. Parallels: Similar to ARM deals. Analogies: Like fueling a rocket in a storm; plugging a leak in sinking ship.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: NVDA stake drives interoperability in AI, X sentiment positive, up 11% premarket despite market drop. Web news confirms partnership.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 15% upside on AI momentum, target $102.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Broader tech correction from oil/inflation, dilution from investment.

stocks.justification: Direct investment news from major player NVDA, high X engagement.

stocks.impact_theory: Down YTD 11% on Iran war inflation fears crushing tech, but $2B MRVL invest reignites AI. Economic: Higher rates hurt growth stocks. Psychology: Fear of peak AI. Parallels: 2022 tech bear. Analogies: Storm cloud over sunny field; speed bump on highway.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: MRVL deal positive, X buzz on Jensen, but Nasdaq down 10% on war/oil. Down 19% recent dip buy talk.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Escalating war delays AI capex, rate hikes.

stocks.justification: Strong news offset by macro headwinds.

stocks.impact_theory: Iran war/tanker attacks spike oil to $103+, bullish energy. Economic: Supply disruption premiums. Psychology: Safe haven flight. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine. Analogies: Filling gas tank in shortage; betting on fire in drought.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Oil surge from Hormuz tensions, X watchlists, up with OXY/CVX.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Trump ends war quickly, oil drops.

stocks.impact_theory: Same as XOM: War disrupts Hormuz, oil rallies hurt consumers but boost producers. Economic: Inflation via energy. Psychology: Fear trade. Parallels: Gulf wars. Analogies: Windfall in chaos; umbrella in rain.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X mentions with XOM, sentiment breakdown but rotating back on oil high.

stocks.justification: Direct tie to oil price action.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil at $103 crushes tech, lifts OXY up 58% YTD. Economic: Buffett stake amplifies. Psychology: Value rotation. Parallels: Energy boom 2022. Analogies: Rising tide lifts boats; phoenix from ashes.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Oil rally, Buffett buying, top mover in energy.

stocks.justification: Strong performance amid clear news driver.
